input.final_summary: Auth app has two validation paths: OAuth allowlists through AUTH_ALLOWED_URIS_BY_CLIENT_ID and app-mode through AUTH_APPS, per-app session secrets, signed auth_state, and return_to policies. Tests/docs cover org-next and virtual-terminal, but several env docs/templates still mention AUTH_SESSION_SECRET/SESSION_SECRET while auth code now requires APPS_SESSION_SECRET for its own transaction/auth cookie fallback.

content.text:
Findings from `/Users/duhl/git/ui`:

- App-mode local calling apps are configured by `AUTH_APPS` in `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/auth/src/lib/app-integration.ts`. `resolveAppConfig()` loads entries by slug, supports `sessionSecretEnv` or inline `sessionSecret`, normalizes `allowedOrigins`, defaults `cookieNames` to `authToken`/`refreshToken`/`idToken`, and defaults `returnToPolicy` to `relative-only`.
- `/authorize` app mode is handled in `beginAuthorizeFn()` in `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/auth/src/features/auth/server-functions.ts`. It requires `app`, `return_to`, and `auth_state`; rejects unknown apps, verifies `auth_state` via HMAC-SHA256 using the app session secret, validates `return_to`, then redirects to sign-in or silently back to the app if token/refresh cookies exist.
- `return_to` validation is in `isAllowedReturnTo()` / `pickReturnToTarget()` in `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/auth/src/lib/app-integration.ts`. Default policy only accepts relative paths starting with `/`, rejects `//` and backslashes, then prepends the appâ€™s first `allowedOrigins` value. Absolute redirects are only allowed if `returnToPolicy: { allowedOrigins: [...] }`.
- App cookies are signed TanStack `useSession` cookies in `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/auth/src/lib/app-token-cookies.ts`. `appSessionConfig()` uses per-app cookie names, `password: app.sessionSecret`, `httpOnly`, `sameSite: "lax"`, `path: "/"`, blank `cookieDomain` as host-scoped, and `secure` only when `NODE_ENV=production` and not mock mode.
- Auth appâ€™s own transaction/auth/mock sessions are in `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/auth/src/lib/session.ts`; they call `getSessionSecret()` / `getAuthCookieSecret()`. Important: current code reads `APPS_SESSION_SECRET` in `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/auth/src/lib/env.ts`, but `.env.test`, `.env.template`, and `env.test.ts` still use/assert `AUTH_SESSION_SECRET`, which looks like likely config/test drift.
- OAuth-style local callbacks are separate: `AUTH_ALLOWED_URIS_BY_CLIENT_ID` is parsed in `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/auth/src/lib/env.ts` and used for OAuth `redirect_uri`, `session_url`, and logout URLs. That path only accepts normalized `https:` URLs, so it is not the same as app-mode `AUTH_APPS.allowedOrigins`, which accepts localhost origins.
- Local-dev conditionals are mostly `VITE_AUTH_MOCK_MODE` and `shouldUseSecureCookies()`: mock mode skips Cognito logout/refresh behavior, can generate mock app tokens, disables secure cookies even in production mock preview, and omits auth cookie domain for mock auth cookies.
- Current first-party app-mode consumers are covered by tests/config for `org-next` and `virtual-terminal`: `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/auth/src/lib/app-integration.org-next.test.ts`, `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/auth/src/lib/app-integration.virtual-terminal.test.ts`, plus consumer-side builders in `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/org-next/src/server/auth-state.ts` and `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/virtual-terminal/src/server/auth-state.ts`.

Likely updates if behavior/config changes: `app-integration*.test.ts`, `app-token-cookies.test.ts`, `contracts.test.ts`, `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/auth/tests/integration/app-mode.spec.ts`, `.env.test`, `.env.template`, `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/auth/docs/app-integration.md`, and the consumer app `auth-state`/`session.server` tests.
